description: Create a custom Block Type named 'Promo Banner' (machine name: `promo_banner`) with two fields: 'Promo Link' (Link field, machine name: `field_promo_link`) and 'Coupon Code' (Text (plain) field, machine name: `field_coupon_code`). Create a block instance of this type with the description 'Summer Audio Sale', setting the Coupon Code to 'SUMMER20' and the Promo Link to '/products' with the link text 'Shop Audio'. Place this block into the 'Sidebar' region of the default theme.
